heading: Applicability to certain natural gas projects
label: 8810 Applicability to certain natural gas projects
text: Nothing in this subtitle or the amendments made by this subtitle shall apply with respect to any activity relating to a project described in subsection (a) of to which the exception under that section applies at the time of the activity.section 8783 of this title
notes: References in TextThis subtitle, referred to in text, is subtitle D (§§ 1241–1255) of title XII of div. A of , , , known as the Iran Freedom and Counter-Proliferation Act of 2012, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of subtitle D to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 112–239126 Stat. 2004section 8801 of this titleJan. 2, 2013
